title: The God’s Knights Move on Elbaf
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Nami, Unknown person #14, Gunko, Unknown person #15 as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doga ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'm afraid I'll have to step back and refuse your offer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure it's an honor to be invited to join your noble knights...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that would make you celestial dragons, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really expect anyone on the planet to willingly become scum like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: All the information we sent to Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...reported a giant crow heading for them before their transmissions got cut off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm done just standing by and listening...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stay back if you want to keep breathing.

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
